_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Up to 90% inhibition of p-ERK (mean 60%) was observed from 2 to 5 h and did not differ between genotypes...The magnitude of p-ERK inhibition positively correlated with selumetinib plasma concentration at 2 h and 5 h
details: Successfully detected up to 90% inhibition of p-ERK (mean 60%) in PBMCs from 2 to 5 hours after selumetinib treatment, with positive correlation to plasma concentration
